title: Departments collection GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of a collection of departments.

collection.description: The array containing all the departments on the agreement.

items.title: Department
items.description: A specific department on the agreement.

departmentNumber.description: A unique identifier of the department.

barred.description: Indicates if the department is barred from usage. Default is false.

self.description: A unique link reference to the department item.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: The unique self reference of the departments collection.
